name: ext-mint
_note: MUTATING. POST → 200 (controller @HttpCode(200), not 201 — feedback_nest_post_status.md). Response body is ONLY {token, id} — token is the one-time dr_ext_* secret (random), id is the new row uuid; both ignored (presence+non-empty). Nothing else is returned, so the gate's real check here is status-code + body-shape parity. OPERATOR: each replay revokes the prior active row for this (user, device_id) and INSERTS a new row — revoked rows accumulate (list() filters revoked_at IS NULL so the visible count stays 1 per device). Reuse one device_id; clean up revoked rows afterward on the throwaway user.
